title: Stabilize procedure grid accuracy bar slot

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Behavior spec: procedure grid cards always reserve the bottom accuracy-bar slot; when feedback evaluation data is present, the grid bar includes original/current baseline markers from the selected evaluation's baseline associations.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented locally: procedure grid now always renders a same-size accuracy bar slot, blank until feedback summary data is available. Summary hydration now attaches baseline/current baseline accuracies from evaluation parameters and uses optimizer manifest baseline associations when selected evaluations do not carry those IDs. Verified focused Jest tests and dashboard typecheck.
